name: Africanos Property Developers Ltd
description: Africanos Property Developers Ltd is an established family-run real estate business specializing in residential and commercial property in Larnaca, Cyprus and its surrounding district. Africanos Developers is one of the leading property developers in Cyprus serving its local and international clientele for more than thirty years. Founder and Managing Director of Africanos Property Developers, Mr. Anastasis Anastasiou has combined his knowledge of the real estate market in Cyprus with the dedication and expertise of his sons, Themis and Panayiotis. Africanos Property Developers started as a small venture in 1997 in Larnaca and has flourished into a reputable organization with countless sales in first-class properties. Africanos Property Developers accomplished more than 200 multi-residential projects that have been sold and completed together with the issue of all relevant property title deeds. We offer much more than secure real estate transactions. Our dedicated Team provides all professional Real Estate related services that make any property transaction stress-free as we assist our clients through all stages of purchasing a property in Cyprus. Africanos specialized guidance assists through the fast-track Permanent Residence Programme helping with the the granting of permanent residence permits to foreign real estate investors in Cyprus.

name: lifestylepop Shop & Blog
description: The concept of Lifestylepop was born from the vision of our founder, Lenush. With a deep passion for fashion and styling, Lenush recognised a growing interest among women of all ages seeking advice and insights into the world of luxury. Over a year ago, she set out to create a platform that beautifully combines the needs of women looking to declutter their wardrobes with the excitement of other women eager to discover affordable luxury items. Lenush has an extensive knowledge of the modern consumer's desires. Her goal is to dismantle the rigid barriers surrounding luxury commodities, making them more accessible and relatable. Join us on this exciting journey towards sustainable luxury, where every purchase and sale contributes to a more eco-friendly future!

name: jrobuchon Resturant & Catering
description: lJoël Robuchon International has inherited the precious legacy of Joël Robuchon. Our mission is clear, to steadfastly uphold his core beliefs of excellence, simplicity and consistency in every culinary endeavour. Over the years, Joël Robuchon mentored many chefs. Today these chefs remain the banner men of his legacy. Today we continue to offer favourite dishes, whilst developing new concepts, innovative products and the creation of an Institute International Joël Robuchon (cookery school). Joël Robuchon was born in Poitiers in 1945. He started his culinary career at the tender age of 15, and by the 1970’s, in Paris, had already gained a reputation as a highly accomplished but ‘rebel chef’ by bucking the trends of minimalism in commonplace nouvelle cuisine and returning to hearty dishes executed to perfection. Critics described eating his famed mashed potato as an ‘emotional’ experience. Having built up a long list of Michelin stars and accolades, at the age of 51, he shocked the culinary world, by announcing his retirement to allow him to spend time with his family and travel the world. He discovered Asia and fell in love with Japanese culture and traditions. Several years later he returned to being a restaurateur, introducing a refreshing, accessible concept L’atelier, which housed the Japanese dining counter for European food, allowing sociable dining of the highest quality without the pomp and ceremony. Joël Robuchon died in 2018. He was the most Michelin starred chef, holding a world record of 32 stars in 2016.

name: Faros Sea Residence
description: Faros Sea Residence is an exclusive collection of beachfront villas within a peaceful gated community offering 16 unique villas for private ownership. The development is located on the east coast of Cyprus, conveniently situated only 10 minutes from the islands main International Airport and 15 minutes from Larnaka city centre offering culture, entertainment, restaurants and shopping. These beautiful villas which boast an exemplary finish and presented to the highest possible standard, are situated in a private location maintaining a serene and quite ambience. Careful planning provides extremely comfortable accommodation offering a wealth of living space and ample entertaining areas for your family and honored guests. The villas boast extremely spacious 5, 6 and 7 bedroom family homes, offering extensive living areas from 676m² to 1703m². Each villa is well laid out for personal living and entertainment, but perhaps the best thing of all are their large landscaped gardens with magnificent private swimming pools which allow you to enjoy outdoor activities in total seclusion. The villas are built on individual plots, ranging from 1,082m² to 3,492m², ensuring the utmost in space and harmony. A rare opportunity to secure some of Larnaka’s remaining prime real estate in an exceptional development located in Pervolia. The project is completed and sales have commenced. The Faros Sea Residence, luxury at its best.

name: Eastern Partnership Electronic Communications Regulators Network (EaPeReg)
description: The Eastern Partnership Electronic Communications Regulators Network (EaPeReg) is a thriving exchange of information platform that ever since its establishment (2012) has been successfully bringing together the EaP National Regulatory Authorities (NRAs). Those of EU member states with a clear goal to support the EaP countries in the implementation of the EU best practices, mainly by facilitating the direct access to best practices, guiding the EaP countries into the EU policy and principles in the telecom sector, and hence enabling the extension of the EU digital single market benefits to the EaP citizens’ benefits and welfare. The unique concept of EaPeReg has helped the EaP countries to achieve significant progress on the objectives set under deliverable 7 Harmonization of digital market , notably in the area of roaming, by developing Regional Roaming Agreement, better coordination of radio spectrum, developing in this regard the Regional Spectrum Agreement, ensuring an appropriate legal framework that strengthens the independence of the NRAs independence and empowers them to take measures to ensure competition on the telecom markets and to empower the end-users. Considering that digital transformation requires a harmonized approach on issues that are transnational by nature (i.e. spectrum coordination, roaming etc) the role of the regional associations has become more and more important. Therefore, EaPeReg has established very successful cooperation with other similar exchange of practice platforms (BEREC, EMERG, REGULATEL) and actively participate in the ITU activities, pursuant to the MoU of cooperation signed in this regard.
